AbiWord 2.4

Cocoa version for MacOSX.

Introduction
License
Guide
Templates
Language
Dictionaries

Dictionaries

OS X comes with a number of dictionaries, which (as far as I can tell) are:

  • Dutch (Netherlands)
  • English (Australia) [Panther Only]
  • English (Canada)
  • English (UK)
  • English (US)
  • French (France)
  • German (Germany)
  • Italian (Italy)
  • Portuguese (Portugal)
  • Portuguese (Brasil)
  • Spanish (Spain)
  • Swedish (Sweden)

You do not need to install these!

However, you can download a number of dictionaries for other languages for AbiWord (see instructions for how to install these below):

Language Code (LANG)

Language name (Country)

 Download (zip) OS X Support
ca-ES Catalan download  
cs-CZ Czech download  
da-DK Danish download  
de-CH Swiss download  
de-DE German (Germany) download German dictionary since 10.2
de-AT German (Austria) download  
en-AU English (Australia) download Australian English dictionary since 10.3
en-CA English (Canada) download Canadian English dictionary since 10.2
en-GB English (Great Britain) download (British) English dictionary since 10.2
en-IE English (Ireland) download  
en-NZ English (New Zealand) download  
en-US English (United States) download (American) English dictionary since 10.2
en-ZA English (South Africa) download  
eo Esperanto download  
es-ES Spanish (Spain) download Spanish dictionary since 10.2
es-MX Spanish (Mexico) download  
fi-FI Finnish download  
fr-BE French (Belgium) download  
fr-CA French (Canadian) download  
fr-CH French (Switzerland) download  
fr-FR French (France) download French dictionary since 10.2
hu-HU Hungarian download  
gl-ES Galician download  
it-IT Italian download Italian dictionary since 10.2
la-IT Latin (Renaissance) download  
lt-LT Lithuanian download  
nl-NL Dutch download Dutch dictionary since 10.2
pl-PL Polish download  
pt-PT Portuguese (Portugal) download Portuguese dictionary since 10.2
pt-BR Portuguese (Brazil) download (Brazilian) Portuguese dictionary since 10.2
sl-SI Slovenian download  
sv-SE Swedish download Swedish dictionary since 10.2
uk-UA Ukrainian download  

Installation

You should get a file with the extension "hash" (this may be inside a folder - if so, please ignore any other files in the folder). For example, the Catalan dictionary is downloaded as "abispell-ca-ES.ppc.zip" and the archive contains the file "catala.hash".

If you are an administrator:

To install a dictionary so that all users can use it, place it in this folder:

		/Library/Application Support/AbiSuite/dictionary

If this folder does not exist, create it, or start AbiWord while logged in as an administrator.

If you are not an administrator:

To install a dictionary so that all only you can use it, place it in this folder:

		/Users/[you]/Library/Application Support/AbiSuite/dictionary

(like "brazilian.hash" and "lietuviu.hash" in the screen shot below). If this folder does not exist, create it.
